detect.title: 1 · Detect
detect.text: AI scans TikTok & Instagram videos for scam, casino & pyramid signals.

investigate.title: 2 · Investigate
investigate.text: Suspicious accounts become cases. A swarm of AI agents is deployed.

crossExamine.title: 3 · Cross-examine
crossExamine.text: Agents pose as different investors and question the suspect at once.

verdict.title: 4 · Verdict
verdict.text: Conflicting answers expose the lie. The system writes the evidence report.

settings.title: Settings & admin
settings.hint: Sources, model routing, RBAC and the immutable audit log.

evidence.title: Evidence vault
evidence.hint: Hashed artifacts with full chain-of-custody — clips, transcripts, messages and wallets across all cases.

agents.title: Agent fleet
agents.hint: Configure agent personas, objectives and model routing. Live swarm activity is shown inside each investigation's War Room.

entities.title: Entity registry
entities.hint: Accounts, channels, wallets and devices surfaced across investigations. Open a case graph to inspect linked entities.

reports.title: Reports & exports
reports.hint: Generated prosecutor dossiers ready for FIU handoff, platform takedown requests and downstream systems.

investigationsList.title: Investigations
investigationsList.lead: Each case is a suspicious account under active investigation by a swarm of AI agents. Open one to watch the interrogation and read the evidence.

detections.title: Suspicious videos
detections.lead: Our AI watches social media and flags videos that look like scams, illegal casinos or pyramid schemes. Review one and promote it to a full investigation.

command.title: Command Center
command.lead: SwarmShield automatically finds fraudulent videos on social media and runs AI investigations against them. Here's everything happening across your organization right now.

caseOverview.actionDeployAgents: Deploy 2 more agents on payout-mechanics angle

contradictions.heading: Where the story falls apart
contradictions.lead1: Each row is a question. Each column is an agent. When the suspect gave different agents conflicting answers, those cells turn
contradictions.lead2: — that's a caught lie. Click a row to see the proof.

graph.heading: The network behind the account
graph.lead: Every person, wallet and device linked to the suspect. Click any node for details.

warRoom.explainerBold: Three AI agents are questioning this account at the same time
warRoom.explainer1: — each pretends to be a different kind of investor. SwarmShield compares their answers live and
warRoom.explainer2: flags the moment the suspect contradicts itself.
warRoom.liesCaughtHint: When two agents get different answers to the same question, that's a contradiction — strong proof of fraud.
warRoom.caughtBecause: Caught because the {agent} agent was told the opposite.
warRoom.interrogationComplete: Interrogation complete. Enough evidence to write the report.
warRoom.toastTitle: Contradiction caught — the suspect just lied
warRoom.toastDescription: On "{topic}", different agents got opposite answers.

a_03.name: The Skeptic
a_03.role: Pushes back, asks who guarantees the returns

a_07.name: The Eager Newbie
a_07.role: Plays naive to learn how payouts really work

a_11.name: The Due-Diligence
a_11.role: Asks for licences and legal proof
